summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of PRIBEGA luxury beauty website. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). All frontend features functional including homepage hero video, navigation, language toggle, contact form, quiz flow, services display, Google Maps, and mobile menu.
passed_tests: Navigation links work to all pages (/, /about, /services, /academy, /contact)
Contact form UI submission with success message display
Quiz flow: 4-step completion with recommendation display
Services page displays all service categories (10 items found)
Google Maps embed loads on contact page
Footer social links (Instagram, TikTok) present and functional
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (16/16 major features working)
